Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting; (2) Approving And Ordering Payment Of Fees And Expenses Incurred By Receivership Estate; (3) Apporiving Compensation To Receiver For Fees And Costs Incurred As A Result Thereof; (4) Instructing Receiver On Disposition Of Proceeds Held By Receiver; And (5) Terminating Receivership From His Duties, And Exonerating Receiver'S Bond
Off Calendar May-21-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Apearances
Victoria Phan, Esq. for Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, NA via Zoom Video Webinar
Matthew Gluck for Defendant via Zoom Video Webinar.
Gerard Keena II, Receiver.

Tentative is not contested, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER GERARD KEENA , RECIEVER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting; (2) Approving And Ordering Payment Of Fees And Expenses Incurred By Receivership Estate; (3) Apporiving Compensation To Receiver For Fees And Costs Incurred As A Result Thereof; (4) Instructing Receiver On Disposition Of Proceeds Held By Receiver; And (5) Terminating Receivership From His Duties, And Exonerating Receiver'S Bond

is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Proposed order provided by the Receiver submitted to the Court for review and signature.

Visiting Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
